claim_scope: H/M development-only count-overlap extension; not shadow/final, product accuracy, hardware validation, full ten-material matrix, or manuscript-grade powder XRD

design_rationale.trigger: v8A medium Phase 4 and count-matched rework were stopped by total-count-only controls.
design_rationale.evidence: count-balance sensitivity showed main diffraction signal remains strong when total-count controls pass, but strict balanced subsets lack train/validation/stress-holdout support.
design_rationale.extension_goal: Increase count-overlap support using additional development-only source-on rows, then rerun count-balance sensitivity and Phase 4 controls.
design_rationale.no_go_boundary: Do not open shadow/final or claim product accuracy from this extension.

post_run_conditions: run extension Geant4 rows only if explicitly entering the next execution phase
combine extension source-on rows with existing medium source-on/source-off development features
rerun count-balance sensitivity and count-matched rework gates
